creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best hotel in Thailand? ⬇️⬇️⬇️

I’ve stayed at this hotel twice now - once in a ‘normal’ room and this year in one of their ocean-view pool villas 🇹🇭  Price 💸  I paid €1565 / $1712 for 4 nights in the ocean-view pool villa, including breakfast. Compared to the price of other 5-star hotels in Thailand, I actually think that’s a very good price. And compared to the prices you pay in Europe, it’s a bargain 😅  📍The hotel is called Santhiya Koh Yao Yai, so as the name suggests, it’s located on Koh Yao Yai between Phuket and Krabi. So you could easily reach the hotel from popular holiday towns such as Ao Nang or Patong 🥰  Share the best hotel you’ve ever stayed at in a comment 🤝  #thailandtravel #kohyaoyai #santhiyakohyaoyai #hotelreview #traveltips

transcription.text: I like the way you kiss, I can tell you miss, I can tell it is, is, is, is. Not trying to be romantic, I'll quit it from the back just so you don't get attacked.
